mapper.sql: select c.config_id, c.dept_id, d.dept_name, c.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, c.status, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark from fe_visit_approve_config c left join sys_dept d on c.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_role r on c.role_id = r.role_id
mapper.select: select role_id as roleId, role_name as roleName, role_key as roleKey, status from sys_role where status = '0' and del_flag = '0' order by role_sort asc, role_id asc
select count(1) from sys_user u inner join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id where u.dept_id = #{deptId} and ur.role_id = #{roleId} and u.status = '0' and u.del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: update fe_visit_approve_config set role_id = #{roleId}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where config_id = #{configId}
